mapper.sql: run_id, query_id, question, normalized_question, retrieval_question, version_tag, strategy_tag, question_type_tag, answer_shape, retrieval_mode, rewrite_applied, rewrite_audit_ref, retrieval_strategy_ref, fused_hit_count, channel_count, fact_card_hit_count, source_chunk_hit_count, coverage_status, channel_run_summary_json::text as channel_run_summary_json, created_at
mapper.select: insert into query_retrieval_runs ( query_id, question, normalized_question, retrieval_question, version_tag, strategy_tag, question_type_tag, answer_shape, retrieval_mode, rewrite_applied, rewrite_audit_ref, retrieval_strategy_ref, fused_hit_count, channel_count, fact_card_hit_count, source_chunk_hit_count, coverage_status, channel_run_summary_json ) values ( #{record.queryId}, #{record.question}, #{record.normalizedQuestion}, #{record.retrievalQuestion}, #{record.versionTag}, #{record.strategyTag}, #{record.questionTypeTag}, #{record.answerShape}, #{record.retrievalMode}, #{record.rewriteApplied}, #{record.rewriteAuditRef}, #{record.retrievalStrategyRef}, #{record.fusedHitCount}, #{record.channelCount}, #{record.factCardHitCount}, #{record.sourceChunkHitCount}, #{record.coverageStatus}, #{record.channelRunSummaryJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler} ) returning run_id
mapper.insert: insert into query_retrieval_channel_hits ( run_id, channel_name, hit_rank, fused_rank, included_in_fused, channel_weight, evidence_type, article_key, concept_id, title, score, fact_card_id, card_type, review_status, confidence, source_chunk_ids_json, source_paths_json, metadata_json ) values ( #{record.runId}, #{record.channelName}, #{record.hitRank}, #{record.fusedRank}, #{record.includedInFused}, #{record.channelWeight}, #{record.evidenceType}, #{record.articleKey}, #{record.conceptId}, #{record.title}, #{record.score}, #{record.factCardId}, #{record.cardType}, #{record.reviewStatus}, #{record.confidence}, #{record.sourceChunkIdsJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, #{record.sourcePathsJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, #{record.metadataJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler} )
mapper.select: select from query_retrieval_runs where query_id = #{queryId} order by created_at desc, run_id desc limit 1
select from query_retrieval_runs order by created_at desc, run_id desc limit #{limit}

select hit_id, run_id, channel_name, hit_rank, fused_rank, included_in_fused, channel_weight, evidence_type, article_key, concept_id, title, score, fact_card_id, card_type, review_status, confidence, source_chunk_ids_json::text as source_chunk_ids_json, source_paths_json::text as source_paths_json, metadata_json::text as metadata_json, created_at from query_retrieval_channel_hits where run_id = #{runId} order by channel_name asc, hit_rank asc, hit_id asc
